characters.name: 江岚
characters.description: 2D国漫少女角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，年轻女性，黑色中长发带整齐刘海，圆润清秀但不幼态的脸，浅灰蓝长袖连衣裙，深色腰带，清楚可见的领口、袖口和裙摆层次，平底深色鞋，身形纤细，气质安静克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景，完整穿衣，不能像灰模或人体模板。

characters.name: 沈砚
characters.description: 2D国漫青年男性角色，风格接近《一人之下》这类现代国漫，黑色短发，清秀偏瘦的脸，深色长外套或长袍内搭浅色上衣，长裤和深色鞋靴，身形修长，气质沉稳克制。标准单人全身正视角色设定图，白底，无道具，无背景。

shots.title: 河边远景建立
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, establishing wide shot, riverside at dusk, old stone bridge spanning the river, willow trees moving lightly in evening wind, wet stone path by the bank, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan standing near the water, same environment layout must stay stable, clean line art, cel-shaded forms, unified character-and-scene stylization
shots.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, abstract texture, warped bridge, melted buildings, random crowd, extra people, deformed anatomy, duplicated body, tiny people, empty scene, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: slow push in, river surface ripples gently, willow leaves sway slightly, both characters remain mostly still and establish screen position
shots.notes: 首帧测试。重点看天空盒/场景图是否正确锁住河岸、桥、树和地平线关系。

shots.title: 双人中景起话
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, medium two shot at the same riverside location, same bridge, same willow trees, same stone bank, Jiang Lan turns slightly toward Shen Yan and begins to speak, Shen Yan listens quietly, keep the exact same costume, hairstyle, face identity and environment layout from previous shot, distinct medium framing from the establishing shot
shots.negative_prompt: different location, changed bridge, changed clothes, wrong face, extra limbs, distant tiny figure, overexposed, noisy image, collage artifacts, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan gives a small head turn and subtle hand gesture while speaking, Shen stays mostly still, camera remains stable
shots.notes: 同场景续帧测试 1。重点看第二张是不是继承第一张的场景布局和人物身份。

shots.title: 江岚近景说话
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, closer medium shot focused on Jiang Lan at the same riverside bank, Shen Yan remains in frame as secondary figure, same old stone bridge and river background orientation, Jiang Lan speaks calmly with a slight side turn, keep the same face, hair, costume color and lighting continuity, clearly closer than the previous medium two shot
shots.negative_prompt: new person, glamour portrait, indoor selfie, fashion shoot, random background, wrong hairstyle, changed outfit, blurry face, cut off head, cut off hands, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Jiang Lan lip movement and a slight shoulder motion, Shen gives a minimal reaction in background, soft river movement continues
shots.dialogue: 江岚：先沿着河岸往前走。
shots.notes: 单人偏主镜头测试。重点看从双人镜头切到偏单人镜头时，人物脸和服装是否保持一致。

shots.title: 沈砚回应点头
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, reverse medium close shot focused on Shen Yan at the same riverside location, Jiang Lan visible as foreground shoulder or side silhouette, same bridge, same willow trees, same dusk light, Shen Yan nods lightly and answers, preserve exact identity, clothing and environment continuity from previous shots, use a clear reverse angle rather than repeating the prior composition
shots.negative_prompt: wrong person, swapped character, changed environment, malformed hands, duplicated face, extreme close crop, empty scene, heavy blur, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: Shen nods gently and gives a brief reply, camera stays steady, background remains unchanged
shots.dialogue: 沈砚：好，桥那边看得更清楚。
shots.notes: 反打测试。重点看角色不会互换身份，且桥和河岸方向不翻转。

shots.title: 并肩沿河慢走
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, medium wide shot, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan begin walking slowly side by side along the same riverside path, same stone bridge behind them, same riverbank, same willow trees and dusk atmosphere, preserve both character identities and same environment layout while changing body pose, stride, and staging from the prior static dialogue shots
shots.negative_prompt: different background, changed bridge position, random strangers, body duplication, fused limbs, floating feet, deformed anatomy, far away tiny people, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters take a few slow steps forward, clothes move lightly in the breeze, camera tracks gently with them
shots.notes: 动作续帧测试。重点看人物姿势变化时，角色身份和场景是否还能稳住。

shots.title: 桥边停步收尾
shots.prompt: 2D guoman animation storyboard keyframe, closing medium two shot near the same bridge by the riverside, Jiang Lan and Shen Yan stop walking and look toward the water, same dusk lighting, same bridge orientation, same willow trees, same stone bank, preserve exact face, clothing and scene continuity, final held composition distinct from the walking shot
shots.negative_prompt: new location, changed costume, changed face, indoor lighting, abstract smear, low detail, duplicated person, body out of frame, text watermark
shots.video_prompt: both characters stop and hold briefly, subtle eye movement and slight cloth motion, soft water ripples in background
shots.dialogue: 江岚：就从这里开始看吧。
shots.notes: 收尾测试。重点看经过多张连续镜头后，最后一张是否仍然保持同一场景和同一角色。
